context_api.reason: focus-manager sample/UTC source also uses layouts.

symbols.brief: Provides the functionality of handling focus navigation and maintaining the two dimensional focus chain.
Creates a FocusManager handle; this can be initialized with FocusManager::New().
Layout is a View that arranges child views using a layout algorithm.
Class representing a rectangle for layout positioning and sizing.
StackLayout arranges its children in a single row or column.

context_api.reason: focus-manager primary symbol inherits from BaseHandle.

symbols.brief: Provides the functionality of handling focus navigation and maintaining the two dimensional focus chain.

evidence.value: View GetCurrentFocusView() View A handle to the current focused view or an empty handle if no view is focused
View GetFocusGroup(View view) View The focus group the given view belongs to or an empty handle if the given view doesn't belong to any focus group
View GetFocusIndicatorView() View A handle to the focus indicator view
bool IsFocusGroup(View view) const bool Whether the view is set as a focus group
bool RequestFocus(View view) bool Whether the focus is successful or not
void SetAsFocusGroup(View view, bool isFocusGroup) void
bool SetCurrentFocusView(View view) bool Whether the focus is successful or not

examples_legacy.snippet:
}

private:
  void OnInit(Application application)
  {
    Window window = application.GetWindow();
    window.SetBackgroundColor(UiColor(0xFFFFFF));

    window.Add(StackLayout::New(StackOrientation::VERTICAL)
      .SetSpacing(STACK_SPACING)
      .SetRequestedWidth(MATCH_PARENT)
      .SetRequestedHeight(MATCH_PARENT)
      .SetPadding(Extents(STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING))
      .Children({
        Label::New("Text Marquee Example\n"
                   "Test options:\n"
                   "[1] Start Marquee, [2] Stop Marquee, [i] Information\n"
                   "Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL")
          .SetFontSize(14.0f)
          .SetMultiLine(true)
          .SetLineHeight(1.6f)
          .SetFocusable(true)
          .SetTouchFocusable(true),

        StackLayout::New(StackOrientation::VERTICAL)
          .SetRequestedWidth(MATCH_PARENT)
          .SetSpacing(STACK_SPACING)
          .SetPadding(Extents(STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING))
          .SetBackgroundColor(UiColor(0xEFEFEF))
          .Children({
            Label::New("MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),

            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .As(mLabelLtr),

            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_RTL, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .As(mLabelRtl),

            Label::New("Text::MarqueeOrientation::VERTICAL")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),
            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ true, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL, Text::MarqueeOrientation::VERTICAL)
              .As(mLabelMultiline),

            Label::New("When focused, the marquee runs if the text is long")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),
            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .SetFocusable(true)
              .SetTouchFocusable(true)
              .As(mLabelFocus),
          }),

        StackLayout::New(StackOrientation::VERTICAL)
          .SetRequestedWidth(MATCH_PARENT)
          .SetSpacing(STACK_SPACING)
          .SetPadding(Extents(STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING, STACK_PADDING))
          .SetBackgroundColor(UiColor(0xEFEFEF))
          .Children({
            Label::New("MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),

            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .As(mOverflowLabel),

            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_RTL, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .As(mOverflowLabelRtl),

            Label::New("Text::MarqueeOrientation::VERTICAL")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),
            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ true, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::ON_OVERFLOW, Text::MarqueeOrientation::VERTICAL)
              .As(mOverflowLabelMultiline),

            Label::New("When focused, the marquee runs if the text is long")
              .SetFontSize(14.0f),
            CreateMarqueeLabel(TEXT_LTR, /* multiline */ false, Text::MarqueeTriggerPolicy::MANUAL, Text::MarqueeOrientation::HORIZONTAL)
              .SetFocusable(true)
              .SetTouchFocusable(true)
              .As(mOverflowLabelFocus),
          }),

primary_api.brief: Provides the functionality of handling focus navigation and maintaining the two dimensional focus chain.

members.brief: Sets whether a view is a focus group (focus trap).
members.name: SetAsFocusGroup

members.brief: Sets whether to clear focus when window loses focus.
members.name: SetClearFocusOnWindowFocusLost

members.brief: Sets the focus directly to the given view.
members.name: SetCurrentFocusView

members.brief: Gets the singleton of FocusManager object.
members.name: Get

members.brief: Gets whether to clear focus when window loses focus.
members.name: GetClearFocusOnWindowFocusLost

members.brief: Returns the closest ancestor of the given view that is a focus group.
members.name: GetFocusGroup

members.brief: Gets the device of the last focus change.
members.name: GetLastFocusChangeDevice

members.brief: Gets the device name that caused the last focus change.
members.name: GetLastFocusChangeDeviceName

members.brief: This signal is emitted after the current focused view has been changed.
members.name: FocusChangedSignal

members.brief: Checks whether the view is set as a focus group or not.
members.name: IsFocusGroup

members.brief: Clears the focus from the current focused actor if any, so that no actor is focused in the focus chain.
members.name: ClearFocus

members.brief: Creates a FocusManager handle; this can be initialized with FocusManager::New().
members.name: FocusManager

members.brief: Moves the focus to the next focusable actor in the focus chain in the given direction (according to the focus traversal order).
members.name: MoveFocus

members.brief: Move the focus to prev focused actor.
members.name: MoveFocusBackward

members.brief: Requests focus on the given view with child delegation.
members.name: RequestFocus
